---
title: "test_pennyone_empire.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_pennyone_empire.ts"
loc: 66
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.30
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 3.21
overall_score: 2.94
---

## Intent
Calculates structural logic density using CC and nesting metrics.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [it](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [calculateLogicScore](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/calculus/logic.js)
- [calculateStyleScore](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/calculus/style.js)
- [calculateIntelScore](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/calculus/intel.js)
- [analyzeFile](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/analyzer.js)

### Exports
- `score`
- `score`
- `goodCode`
- `score`
- `badCode`
- `score`
- `badUI`
- `goodUI`
- `badScore`
- `goodScore`
- `undocumented`
- `documented`
- `lowScore`
- `highScore`
- `code`
- `result`
- `code`
- `result`
